overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a samurai-themed video game showing a character walking along a rocky coastline at dusk. The character moves from shallow water along the beach past a large shipwreck toward a traditional Japanese coastal village with wooden buildings.

events.description: character begins walking forward from a stationary position in the shallow water
steps out of the water onto the dry rocky beach shoreline

agents.ego_description: samurai character walks along the shoreline, transitioning from shallow water onto the rocky beach while looking toward the coastal village

entered.detail: calm turquoise water with bright reflection where the character stands
dark gravel and stone beach along the waterline
hazy mountain range visible across the water
cluster of traditional Japanese wooden houses with dark roofs
tall evergreen trees lining the edge of the village

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai standing in shallow coastal water at dusk. The character begins walking along the rocky shoreline, moving from the water onto the gravel beach. Traditional wooden village buildings and pine trees are visible in the distance on the left, while open water stretches to the right with mountains visible across the bay.

events.description: large wooden shipwreck becomes visible beached on the shoreline to the right

agents.ego_description: continues walking steadily along the rocky beach, approaching the large shipwreck and village buildings

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with broken mast lying on its side on the beach
tall wooden framework structure near the shipwreck

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open rocky beach as a large wooden shipwreck comes into view on the right. The traditional village buildings on the left grow larger and more detailed as the character approaches. The ocean remains visible to the right with waves lapping against the shore, while the shipwreck's broken mast and wooden structure dominate the middle distance.

events.description: moves from open beach into the village area, passing wooden fences and stone walls

agents.ego_description: walks toward the village entrance, passing the shipwreck and moving between wooden structures into a more enclosed space

entered.detail: tall wooden framework with horizontal beams marking the village entrance
low stone retaining wall along the side of the path
dark wooden slat fence running alongside the building
narrow dirt and gravel pathway leading into the village

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the village entrance, passing the shipwreck which now lies behind to the right. The scene transitions from the open beach to a semi-enclosed village path with wooden gates, stone walls, and traditional buildings close on both sides. The ocean and distant mountains exit the frame as the character enters the village space, walking on a dirt path between wooden fences and structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open coastline at dusk into the enclosed architecture of a traditional Japanese village. It begins with a samurai standing in shallow coastal water, moving steadily across a rocky shoreline with distant mountains and pine trees framing the horizon. As the character advances, the open beach expands to reveal a massive wooden shipwreck with a broken mast on the right, while the village buildings on the left grow larger and more detailed. The scene then shifts from the expansive shore to a semi-enclosed village path, leaving the ocean and mountains behind as the camera passes the wreck. Finally, the environment narrows into a dirt corridor flanked by wooden gates, stone walls, and traditional structures as the character enters the heart of the settlement.
